result.stdout:
Azure Migrate data extractor
Description:
  Azure Migrate Data Extractor

Usage:
  AzureMigrateDataExtractor [options]

Options:
  --tenant-id <tenant-id> (REQUIRED)
  --subscription-id <subscription-id> (REQUIRED)
  --resource-group-name <resource-group-name> (REQUIRED)
  --azure-migrate-project-name <azure-migrate-project-name> (REQUIRED)
  --output-path <output-path> (REQUIRED)
  --version                                                             Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                        Show help and usage information
